content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月12日 周五
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [apple/coreai-models](https://github.com/apple/coreai-models)
   Model export recipes, Python primitives, and Swift runtime utilities for on-devi | ⭐733
2. [xiaohuailabs/xiaohu-video-translate](https://github.com/xiaohuailabs/xiaohu-video-translate)
   对 AI 说一句话，把外语视频自动配上中文字幕 —— 下载/转写/翻译/润色/烧录一条龙，全程本地，转写零 API 费 | ⭐463
3. [jmmy9609-design/gpt-pp](https://github.com/jmmy9609-design/gpt-pp)
    | ⭐353
4. [XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-money](https://github.com/XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-money)
   AI 时代靠谱兼职发现 + 反诈验证 skill：需求信号反推 + 实时时效核查 + 反诈 rubric + 个性化校准环 | ⭐225
5. [valkor-ai/loom](https://github.com/valkor-ai/loom)
   Loop engineering for agentic software delivery. | ⭐225
6. [BuilderIO/skills](https://github.com/BuilderIO/skills)
   Skills for coding agents | ⭐201
7. [SkyBlue997/enableMacosAI](https://github.com/SkyBlue997/enableMacosAI)
   国行 Mac 一键开启完整 Apple 智能(端侧 + Private Cloud Compute 云端)· macOS 27 / Apple Silicon | ⭐175
8. [khrisat/text-humanizer](https://github.com/khrisat/text-humanizer)
   Advanced open-source AI humanizer designed to make AI-generated text undetectabl | ⭐133

    | ❤️7808

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
